data.name: Extended Stay
data.detailed_description:
-This is an adult-oriented game, anyone under the age of 18 shouldn't play this game-

Extended Stay is a monster-girl brothel management simulation where your success relies on keeping your guests happy. By fulfilling their desires, you’ll unlock sex scenes and earn the money needed to keep your brothel running. As your business expands, you can hire more employees, unlock new races and costumes, and attract wealthier clientele.

Features:

  • 16 fully interactive sex scenes based on your input

  • Experience each sex scene from an immersive POV perspective

  • Randomly generated guests and characters

  • 12 unique monster-girl races to choose from

  • In-depth character customization with a wide selection of clothing and accessories

In Extended Stay, both characters and guests are procedurally generated, from breast size to personality and sexual preferences. Each employee you hire plays a distinct role in your brothel, catering to specific desires of your guests. As they work, employees gain experience and improve their skills, becoming better equipped to please guests. Over time, employees may develop attractions to each other.

Once an employee forms a strong attraction, you can pair them with another employee for a sex scene of your choosing. The sex scenes in Extended Stay are fully interactive, giving you complete control over the action. Using your mouse, you can adjust speed and movement across all 16 unique sex positions.

data.short_description: Extended Stay is a monster-girl brothel management sim where you must keep your guests satisfied to succeed. By satisfying your guests you'll unlock sex scenes and earn money to keep your brothel in business.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 土耳其文*, 菲律賓語*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7x64 / Windows 8.1x64 / Windows 10x64
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 2.5 Ghz or AMD Phenom II 2.6 Ghz or greater
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB & AMD 5570 or nVidia 450 or Intel Integrated Graphics 530
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7x64 / Windows 8.1x64 / Windows 10x64
  • 處理器: Fourth Generation Intel Core i5 2.5 Ghz or AMD FX8350 4.0 Ghz or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2GB & AMD 7970 or nVidia 770 or greater
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Device
